prompt: Split reload and process-level reboot semantics
note: Kept reboot as process-level restart for code reload, and restored the previous CliContext-only soft reset as a reload command. reload rebuilds CLI context, reloads saved-configuration, and returns to user mode without replacing the Python process.

+

Upgrade reboot to process-level restart

+

Changed reboot from CliContext-only soft reset to process-level restart. The reboot command now prints shutdown progress, stops VVRP packet input/frame debug services, flushes output, and re-execs the current Python interpreter with the VVRP module so changed code is reloaded cross-platform. Tests patch the exec path to verify argv without replacing the test process.
